description:
This 16-question assessment tests intermediate-to-advanced Bash scripting proficiency, covering everything from core syntax to tricky pitfalls. The tone is engaging and playfully challenging, designed to push learners to sharpen their practical shell programming abilities while providing targeted resources for improvement.
Topics: Bash scripting, Variables, Loops, Conditionals, String manipulation, Functions, Syntax gotchas
Audience: Developers, system administrators, and IT professionals seeking to validate or improve their command-line scripting capabilities.
